text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Committed, thanks. 

I have also updated and tested the ports using libsigsegv, 
because the shared library version number changed, as it 
includes incompatible changes. 

For now I set maintainer to myself to catch an problems. 
Hung-Yi Chen: please let me know if you still want to maintain this.
